signals.headline: WisdomTree & Grayscale XRP ETF Filings Clear Final SEC Review | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
WisdomTree & Grayscale XRP ETF Filings Clear Final SEC Review | YES | MED confidence**  
WisdomTree and Grayscale confirmed their spot XRP ETF filings advanced to final SEC review stage ahead of Q2 2026 decisions, joining 21Shares, Franklin Templeton, Bitwise, and Canary; combined spot ETF AUM hit $1B with $119.6M weekly inflows ending Apr 11.[6]

signals.headline: XRP ETF Inflows Surge to $41
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Inflows Surge to $41.64M (Week Ending Apr 16), Largest in 3 Months | YES | HIGH confidence**  
U.S. spot XRP ETFs saw $41.64 million in net inflows for the week ending April 16—a 254% jump from the prior week's $11.75 million—driving a 12.5% price surge from April lows to ~$1.44 amid a forming cup-and-handle pattern.[1]
